2603.15481.title: TabKD: Tabular Knowledge Distillation through Interaction Diversity of Learned Feature Bins
2603.15481.paper_summary: Data-free knowledge distillation enables model compression without original training data, critical for privacy-sensitive tabular domains. However, existing methods does not perform well on tabular data because they do not explicitly address feature interactions, the fundamental way tabular models encode predictive knowledge. We identify interaction diversity, systematic coverage of feature combinations, as an essential requirement for effective tabular distillation. To operationalize this insight, we propose TabKD, which learns adaptive feature bins aligned with teacher decision boundaries, then generates synthetic queries that maximize pairwise interaction coverage. Across 4 benchmark datasets and 4 teacher architectures, TabKD achieves highest student-teacher agreement in 14 out of 16 configurations, outperforming 5 state-of-the-art baselines. We further show that interaction coverage strongly correlates with distillation quality, validating our core hypothesis. Our work establishes interaction-focused exploration as a principled framework for tabular model extraction.
2603.15481.paper_summary_zh: 資料無關的知識蒸餾使得在沒有原始訓練數據的情況下進行模型壓縮，這對於隱私敏感的表格領域至關重要。<lb/>然而，現有的方法在表格數據上表現不佳，因為它們並未明確處理特徵互動，這是表格模型編碼預測知識的基本方式。<lb/>我們確定互動多樣性，即特徵組合的系統性覆蓋，作為有效表格蒸餾的基本要求。<lb/>為了將這一見解付諸實踐，我們提出了TabKD，它學習與教師決策邊界對齊的自適應特徵區間，然後生成最大化成對互動覆蓋的合成查詢。<lb/>在4個基準數據集和4個教師架構中，TabKD在16種配置中有14種達到了最高的學生-教師一致性，超越了5個最先進的基準。<lb/>我們進一步顯示，互動覆蓋與蒸餾質量之間有很強的相關性，驗證了我們的核心假設。<lb/>我們的工作確立了以互動為中心的探索作為表格模型提取的原則框架。
2603.15481.author: Shovon Niverd Pereira et.al.
2603.15481.authors: Shovon Niverd Pereira, Krishna Khadka, Yu Lei
